# Task
Name: prompt/basic
Title: Basic prompt task
Branch: prompt/basic
Directory: .subtask/tasks/prompt--basic

## Workspace
Your working directory is `/tmp/ws`. This IS your copy of the project — a git worktree of `main` on branch `prompt/basic`.

- Use paths relative to cwd, or absolute paths under cwd.
- Never use absolute paths to other clones of this project (e.g. `/Users/.../Code/<projectname>`). Edits outside your worktree will not appear on your task branch and will not merge.
- If unsure, run `pwd` and `git rev-parse --show-toplevel` — both should match cwd.

## Description
Do the basic thing.

--------------------

Please implement it.
